message:
test(e2e): enhance E2E test coverage and determinism

Comprehensive improvements to the end-to-end test suite:

## Board Tests

Enhances board_e2e_test.go and board_swimlane_e2e_test.go with:
- Additional edge cases for column navigation
- Swimlane view interaction tests
- Status transition verification

## Modal Tests

Updates cass_modal_e2e_test.go with improved coverage for:
- Modal open/close lifecycle
- Keyboard navigation within modals
- Escape key handling

## Timeline Tests

Extends history_timeline_e2e_test.go to cover:
- Timeline navigation edge cases
- Date range filtering
- Empty history scenarios

## TUI Snapshot Tests

Improves tui_snapshot_test.go with:
- Additional snapshot comparisons
- Different terminal size simulations
- Theme variant coverage

## Wizard Tests

Updates wizard_flow_e2e_test.go for:
- Multi-step wizard navigation
- Validation state transitions
- Cancel and back button behavior

All tests ensure deterministic output ordering where applicable
to prevent flaky test failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
